mano_cua.result_summary: SPA模式(ssr:false)下页面正常加载渲染，内容完整显示（Hello Vue 2!, State: 123, Rendered on server: false），Update按钮交互正常（State 123→456），无运行时错误。页面title显示undefined但属于已有meta配置问题，非SPA模式特有bug
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The Update button works correctly - clicking it changed the State from 123 to 456, demonstrating that Vue 2 reactivity is working properly in SPA mode. Page loads normally in SPA mode (ssr:false), all content displayed: Hello Vue 2!, State: 123 with Update button, Rendered on server: false, Links with legacy-capi, Route: /. Only issue: browser tab title shows 'undefined - Nuxt Bridge Play...' indicating head metadata not properly resolved.
